name: Easy Mince Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well and boil gently in a medium saucepan for 25 minutes.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Fill the pie shell with the cooled mixture.
5. Cover the top of the pie with additional pie crust.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
